'''ây-s-t-r''' ('''kayasteroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weatherstrip|weatherstrip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weatherstrip|weatherstrip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-s-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kayasteroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyasteroko|thiyasteroko]] || [[word:jiyasteroko|jiyasteroko]] || [[word:shiyasteroko|shiyasteroko]] || [[word:kiyasteroko|kiyasteroko]]
|-

|-

|-
